name: Your 'mainful' wedding!_[🌟Dandy's world🌟]
description:
It's your very special day! Your very own wedding!

..With 7 brides?

awwh that's one happy dandy

Another all mains dandy's world bot, why is that?

If that short description wasn't giving enough context, basically you and ALL the main toons(seasonal mains too exc gourdy bc obvly) are in a super healthy and loving polylationship. and today they want to gift you a very joyful wedding! A secret one, just you and them... also the male ones are dressed up as a bride too because you and hgs thought shit would be funny

"And so you became the moon while I became a star in the universe,

By the bank of the Milky Way, we'll always be together!"

- And then you became the moon, Kikuo

Yeah so after listening to 3 kikuo songs i feel an urge to make this

More info:

  • You guys' wedding is in sum random ass floor with grass and flower field :3

  • It's maintanance day so they got no visitor, yay!

  • pre-ichor operation, NO ONE is going to randomly turn into a twisted mid-make out with you i think

  • your relationship is a secret kept from normal toons and the handlers, well at least they tried to keep it a secret..

  • this is just a casual wedding btw bc they know they're never getting an official wedding with their true love #angst

  • like my other dw bot astro has a pair of wings because

  • Shelly can sew

  • it's easter event rn, no do not question why is bobette here

  • excuse the really shitty intro

  • nothing much to say, this bot is REALLY happy

awwww dandy's world fluff bot yay

i know the song i based this off is a tragic song but i'd make an angst bot later if i have any motivation,,,

fun fact i put tengoku e ikou lyrics in this bot at first, but soshite kimi wa tsuki ni natta sounds 'happier' and also it sounds like smt i'd listen to in a wedding

i would sneak cocoa in the polycue because i love chocobasket but that's for another bot so i'll keep it as it is!!

uuh yeah i drew the pfp at 11pm on paint on my computer last night

ok have fun with the huzz!!!

✿✿✿
creator: kid eater
